comments: Configuration for VAMS v2.4 to v2.5 data migration (Asset Version databaseId backfill)
_comment_tables: DynamoDB table names (required) - get from CloudFormation stack outputs
_comment_aws: AWS configuration (optional - override with CLI flags)
_comment_instructions: How to use this configuration file
_instructions: 1. Get table names from CloudFormation stack outputs:
2. Update configuration with actual resource names:
Phase 1: Build lookup cache - scans asset storage table to map assetId -> databaseId
Phase 2: Backfill - scans asset versions table, updates records missing databaseId
Phase 3: Verify - counts records with/without databaseId, reports orphaned versions
- dry_run: Test without making changes (default: false)
- limit: Test with subset of items (default: null = all items)
- batch_size: DynamoDB batch write size (default: 25, max: 25)
- Idempotent: Safe to re-run - skips records that already have databaseId
- Continue-on-error: Individual record failures don't stop the migration
- Command-line arguments override config file settings
- Migration is read-only in dry-run mode
- No data is deleted - only new fields are added to existing records
